notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte grounds into a double play, first baseman Bryce Harper to shortstop Trea Turner. Jorge Barrosa out at 2nd. Ketel Marte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Alek Thomas steals (3) 2nd base. Alek Thomas to 3rd. Alek Thomas advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher J.T. Realmuto.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Geraldo Perdomo.

notableEvents.label: Adolis García plunked
notableEvents.detail: Adolis García hit by pitch. Bryson Stott to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
